seoSection.title: Free PDF Tools for Users Worldwide
seoSection.usaDesc: Our PDF merger, compressor and converter tools are widely used by professionals in New York, Los Angeles, Chicago, and across the United States. Process your documents securely with fast cloud servers.
seoSection.chinaTitle: 🇨🇳 面向中国和香港用户的PDF工具
seoSection.chinaDesc: 专为中国大陆及香港用户提供优质的PDF处理服务。支持中文界面，帮助北京、上海、深圳、香港等地区的用户高效处理PDF文档，完全免费。
seoSection.ukDesc: Trusted by businesses in London, Manchester, and Singapore. Our PDF converter and OCR tools help professionals convert scanned documents to searchable, editable PDFs in seconds.
seoSection.caDesc: From Toronto to Sydney, our free PDF tools serve thousands of users daily. Encrypt, sign, and manage your PDF documents with enterprise-grade security — completely free.

aboutSection.title: About PDF Tools Global
aboutSection.subtitle: Your trusted free online PDF solution, serving millions of users worldwide
aboutSection.missionDesc1: At PDF Tools Global, we believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without barriers. Our mission is to provide professional-grade PDF processing capabilities to users around the world — completely free, without registration, and with complete privacy.
aboutSection.missionDesc2: Since our founding, we've helped millions of individuals and businesses in USA, China, Hong Kong, UK, Canada, Singapore, Australia, Japan, Germany, France, and 180+ other countries process their documents efficiently and securely.
aboutSection.freeDesc: No registration required. No hidden fees. No watermarks. Forever free.
aboutSection.fastDesc: Process your PDFs in seconds with our cloud-accelerated infrastructure.
aboutSection.privacyDesc: Your files are never stored. All processing happens in memory and files are deleted immediately.
aboutSection.globalDesc: Available in multiple languages, serving users in 180+ countries worldwide.
aboutSection.teamDesc: We are a diverse team of engineers, designers, and product experts passionate about making document processing simple and accessible. With decades of combined experience in document management and cloud infrastructure, we're dedicated to building the best free PDF tools on the internet.
aboutSection.contactDesc: Have questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you.
